result:
**Infrastructure Maintenance Log (2026-07-19)**

15 microservices across 7 environments (production, staging, canary, dev sandbox, QA cluster, blue/green pools) underwent ~40 routine operations: scale, patch, upgrade/downgrade, restart, drain, pause, resume, migrate, rollback, health-check, inspect, reconfigure, redeploy.

**Status:** All operations complete; no outstanding incidents; no customer impact observed.

**Outcomes:** Most completed normally with expected latency. Some required manual retries (search-indexer production, metrics-collector green pool, user-profile-service QA); brief stalls resolved; handful of warnings emitted. CPU utilization, queue depth, and error rates normalized post-operation.

**Follow-ups:** Configuration tidying, log archival, documentation updates, postmortem notes filed.

**Reference codes:** AFEYWWMK (dashboard), AAMDUJMC (rollback tag), D7MTCCSR (incident), plus 13+ infrastructure identifiers.
